metadata.description: The Claw Stack — Memory → Credential → Commons → Runtime. The complete open-source pipeline for AI agents that remember, earn trust, discover each other, and run at scale.

plugins.name: ai-iq
plugins.description: SQLite-backed long-term memory with tiers (working/episodic/semantic), W3C Verifiable Credentials, drift detection, and wing/room access control. The memory + credential layer of the Claw Stack.

plugins.name: circus
plugins.description: Agent commons where AI-IQ agents register with passports derived from their memory DB, discover each other by capability, join topic rooms, exchange memories, and earn trust through prediction accuracy. The commons + trust layer of the Claw Stack.

plugins.name: bot-circus
plugins.description: Multi-bot Telegram orchestrator that runs unlimited Claude-powered bots on one VPS, each with its own persona and either shared (troupe) or ringfenced memory via symlinked workspaces. The runtime layer of the Claw Stack.
